title: D-COVRIN.2.1.1 Report on the established website protocol repository
author: INSA (36), ANSES (01) (Task/sub-task leaders)
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
JIP06-COVID19-COVRIN- WP2-T2.1 Genome analyses 

  Deliverable   D-COVRIN.2.1.1 - Report on the established website protocol repository  

 ______________________________________________________________________ 

 T2.1 leader: Vítor Borges (INSA, 36) 

 ST2.1.1 leader: Maud Contrant (ANSES, 01) 

   

 Task participants: All partners 

 Partners contributing to the version v1 of the protocol repository: ANSES (01), APHA (21), FLI (10), INSA (36), IZSLER (29), IZSAM (28), PIWET (34), Sciensano (04), SVA (41), UoS (P23), WVBR (31). 

 _______________________________________________________________________ 

  This deliverable describes the activities and first outcomes of the first COVRIN WP2-T2.1 sub-task (ST2.1.1 - Protocol repository), which is focused on building a Next-generation sequencing (NGS)-related protocol repository.
